license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z3ff8jn
title: Vibrio natriegens electrocompetent preparation
author: David Shis

steps_raw.instruction: BHI media stock Brain Heart Infusion broth (BHI) Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #1.10493.0500

BHI + v2 salts Brain Heart Infusion broth (BHI) Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #1.10493.0500 - 204 millimolar (mM) NaCl - 4.2 millimolar (mM) KCl - 23.14 millimolar (mM) MgCl2 - 680 millimolar (mM) Sucrose Filter sterilize or autoclave
**** The day before**** Inoculate 10 mL [BHI + v2 salts] with V. natriegens overnight culture at 30 °C with agitation at 200 r.p.m.
4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Split outgrowth into two chilled 50-mL falcon tubes and incubated on ice for 15min.

4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Carefully decant supernatant and gently resuspend cell pellett in at lesat 1mL of electroporation buffer (680 mM sucrose, 7 mM K2HPO4, pH 7).
**** The day of **** On the following day, prepare 60mL of [BHI + v2 salts] in a baffled flask. Generally, 60mLs of outgrowh yields one electrocompetent cell aliquot.
4 °C Pellett cells at 4 °C, spinning at 5000 rcf for 10mins.
4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Top off centrifuge tube (in most cases a 50mL falcon tube) with electroporation buffer. Gently mix
4 °C (on ice) Pellett cells at 4 °C, spinning at 5000 rcf for 10mins.

4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Carefully aspirate away supernatant with a pipette (pellett will be looser than before). Get volume down to around 1-4mL, pellett does not have to be super dry.

4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Repeat steps 8,9,10 at least three times for a minimum of three washes. After pelleting after final wash, carefully pipette off as much of the supernatant as possible.
Inoculate media with overnight at a dilution of 1:100 to 1:200 (overnight culture/fresh medium). Incubate culture with shaking at 37 °C shaking at 200r.p.m. until an OD600 of 0.5.
4 °C (operator can be at RT, just cells should be chilled) Resuspend pellett so final volume of cells + electroporation buffer is about 50-100uL.
For long term storage. Snap freeze cell aliquots in dry ice bath or liquid nitrogen. 50uL per electrocompetent aliquot. Store at -80.
To check concentration of, generally a 1:1000 inoculation into BHI media should have an OD of 0.15 +/- 0.02. If too dilute, spin down as before and resuspend in a smaller volume.
Thaw Transfer acqueous electrocompetent aliquot to a chilled 0.1cm gapped cuvette on ice.
Apply 0.9 kV. So far tested in a biorad micropulsar. Resuspend cells in 500uL of [BHI+v2 salts]
Outgrow transformation resuspension at 37 °C (or 30C depending on plasmid) with shaking or rotation. Plate outgrowth onto LB plates with selection.
Electroporation buffer - 680 millimolar (mM) sucrose - 7 millimolar (mM) Potassium phosphate dibasic - pH7 Filter or autoclave to sterilize.
